data.description:
Add support for installing, uninstalling, and updating Knots-managed skills for Codex, Claude, and OpenCode. Prefer project-level skill injection when the target tool supports it; otherwise fall back to user-level installation. If a required skill is not detected during install or update flows, prompt the user to install it. Extend Doctor
to verify that the expected skills are configured for the user and report missing setup clearly.  See notes for skills prompts.  note that skills are installed in .claude/skills/<skill_name/SKILL.md  and ~/.codex/skills/<skill_name>/SKILL.md.  If either path is detected (.claude or ~/.codex) and the deployed path is not detected (the file is not there), then it is eligible to be installed.  the opposite logic holds true for uninstalliation.
